overview.Name: Crinetics Pharmaceuticals Inc
overview.Description: Crinetics Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company, focuses on the discovery, development, and commercialization of therapies for rare endocrine diseases and endocrine-related tumors. The company is headquartered in San Diego, California.
overview.Address: 6055 LUSK BOULEVARD, SAN DIEGO, CA, UNITED STATES, 92121
